capabilities.name: Event CRUD
capabilities.verify: calendar_events table + manage_calendar_event RPC/skill (create/update/delete/list w/ range) (migration 20260612120000)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-12 via agent-execute (create→list→delete; time-order CHECK). Verify-first: module previously had NO table (list_events reads bookings). Calendar UI for standalone events. UI shipped 2026-06-12 (calendar events source + NewCalendarEventDialog incl attendees). Dual-surface complete. 2026-07-07: RPC extended with p_visibility + p_reminder_minutes (migration 20260707212000).

capabilities.name: Shared calendars
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. calendar_events.visibility private|team|public (default team) + RLS: private events visible only to creator/admin (Staff-view policy rewritten); manage_calendar_event list filters private for non-creators; export_calendar_ics excludes private unless include_private. Live via MCP gateway: created team event with visibility param (event f8e3ff72). UI: visibility select in NewCalendarEventDialog (Lovable build 2026-07-07).
capabilities.notes: Migration 20260707212000. Per-user granular calendar-sharing lists (share with specific colleague) not modeled — private/team/public covers the Odoo base case.

capabilities.name: Google/Outlook sync
capabilities.verify: Export half DONE 2026-07-07: export_calendar_ics skill live via MCP gateway → valid RFC 5545 VCALENDAR (UTC DTSTART/DTEND, RFC-escaped SUMMARY/DESCRIPTION/LOCATION, VALARM from reminder_minutes) importable in Google/Outlook/Apple. UI: Export .ics download button on CalendarPage (Lovable build 2026-07-07).
capabilities.notes: Partial: one-way export only. Live two-way OAuth sync (Google/Outlook webhooks) not built — would need OAuth flow + sync scheduler.

capabilities.name: Reminders
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-07. calendar_events.reminder_minutes (CHECK 0..20160) + reminder_sent_at; manage_calendar_event accepts p_reminder_minutes (gateway-verified: event f8e3ff72 created with 30-min reminder) and re-arms reminder when starts_at moves; ICS export emits VALARM. Delivery: send-calendar-reminders edge function + 15-min cron sweep (Lovable build 2026-07-07, send-booking-reminders pattern) emails attendees and stamps reminder_sent_at.
capabilities.notes: Migration 20260707212000. Same reminder pipeline pattern as bookings/webinars.

capabilities.name: Invitees/attendees
capabilities.notes: Stored + returned; invite emails/RSVP. UI shipped 2026-06-12 (calendar events source + NewCalendarEventDialog incl attendees). Dual-surface complete. Reminder emails to attendees added 2026-07-07.

capabilities.name: Unified cross-module event aggregation
capabilities.verify: list_events skill aggregates bookings/tasks/leave/renewals/SLA via calendar-sources registry; CalendarPage.tsx
capabilities.notes: Added: differentiator — normalized events from all enabled domain modules in one view.
